word: G431 - ἀνεψιός - anepsiós - an-eps'-ee-os - Sister's son

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνέψιος

- Transliteration: Anepsios

- Phonetic: an-eps'-ee-os

- Definition:

1. a cousin

- Origin: from G1 (as a particle of union) and an obsolete nepos (a brood)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From G1 (as a particle of union) and an obsolete form νέπος nepos (a brood); properly akin that is (specifically) a cousin: - sister´ s son.
